references.name: Mohamed Ali Adan
references.reference: What I like about Zain is he tries to do his job the best way possible. He doesn't take shortcuts nor look for the easy way out. He really does work professionally. I thank him

references.name: Abdisalan Ahmed
references.reference: He doesn't say no to the little or boring jobs. He takes whatever is thrown at him and he does it well.
